message:
perf(utf8): add native TextEncoder/TextDecoder (2400x faster)

- Add bufferToUtf8String() and bufferFromUtf8String() in buffer.zig
- Use QuickJS internal UTF-8 handling (JS_NewStringLen, JS_ToCStringLen)
- Register native functions in _modules._nativeBuffer
- Update TextEncoder.encode() to use native when available
- Update TextDecoder.decode() to use native for UTF-8
